introSection: Wanted Dalton is a steel roller coaster located at Parc Spirou Provence in Monteux, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Wanted Dalton opened in 2018 along with Parc Spirou as Wanted by Lucky Luke and was renamed Wanted Dalton in 2019.

fullText:
Wanted Dalton is a steel roller coaster located at Parc Spirou Provence in Monteux, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.

Wanted Dalton opened in 2018 along with Parc Spirou as Wanted by Lucky Luke and was renamed Wanted Dalton in 2019.
